ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the result is recorded */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the result is recorded */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office for which the votes are cast (e.g., Voters, US Senate, Congress) */,
  "district" TEXT /* District number, if applicable */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate or voter group */,
  "candidate" TEXT /* Name of the candidate or voter group */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes and updates over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the result is the final version */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, electronic voting machine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office FOREIGN KEY ("office") REFERENCES offices ("office_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the county (in square miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters in the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the precinct (in square miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office (in years) */,
  "is_electoral_college" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the office is part of the electoral college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the party's current chairperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)
